text.title: Cross-Channel CPA Rollup Decision Tree
text.summary: Tree mapping observable anomalies in the rollup to the rule from 01-core-rules.xml that gates the fix.

decision-tree.root-question: Do all preconditions hold (≥2 paid channels, stable customer ID, baseline historical organic)?

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology — set up customer ID + baseline first

branch.question: Which signal is suspicious in the rollup?

conclusion.verdict: fix identity resolution; do not publish
add agency + production fees before computing CPA
move view-through to its own column; recompute CPA
split branded vs non-branded rows; apply incrementality
wire cohort retention; CPA alone over-rewards mercenary channels
publish rollup; weekly review with growth + finance

text.example: preconditions=true → view_through_in_attributed=true → single-attribution-model → move view-through to its own column; recompute CPA.
